visual_formats.static_image: A single still image — most compatible, loads on slow connections
visual_formats.gif_template: Template-based GIF with brand element swap-ins — high engagement for young audiences
visual_formats.gif_ai_multiframe: AI-generated multi-frame animated GIF — visually rich, mid-bandwidth cost
visual_formats.animated_banner: CSS/JS animated banner — smooth, lightweight, no video overhead
visual_formats.video_mp4: Short MP4 clip (5–15 sec) — highest engagement, requires good connectivity
visual_formats.voice_audio: TTS audio-only ad — best for non-visual contexts or low-literacy audiences

copy_styles.joke_pun: Humorous one-liner or wordplay — disarms attention, high shareability
copy_styles.cultural_reference: References a local festival, event, or cultural moment — drives relevance
copy_styles.question_hook: Opens with an engaging question — creates cognitive pull
copy_styles.stat_hook: Opens with a compelling number or surprising statistic — signals credibility
copy_styles.inspirational_quote: Aspirational, quote-style messaging — resonates with premium-seekers
copy_styles.urgency_driven: Time-limited or scarcity framing — drives immediate action
copy_styles.direct_offer: Straightforward deal or discount mention — best for price-conscious segments
copy_styles.story_narrative: Short story-style copy with a setup and payoff — emotionally memorable
copy_styles.relatable_observation: We've all been there — mirrors a common lived experience

tones.warm_casual: Friendly, approachable, conversational — works across all ages
tones.playful_energetic: Fun, upbeat, high-energy — best for 13–25 segment
tones.serious_premium: Professional, aspirational, polished — works for finance, premium products
tones.urgent_action: High-pressure, FOMO-inducing — effective for flash sales
tones.nostalgic_emotional: Evocative of memories and emotion — strong for family and cultural brands
tones.informative_helpful: Educational, solution-focused — best for services and fintech
